arts.ttl: Darwin Nunez repays Arne Slot faith after pre-season phone call with Liverpool star
arts.sum: LIVERPOOL 3-0 BOURNEMOUTH: Luis Diaz bagged an early brace and Darwin Nunez got on the scoresheet as Arne Slot's side romped to a comfortable victory at Anfield

arts.ttl: Robertson says Liverpool teammate ‘took chance’ against Bournemouth
arts.sum: Andy Robertson has praised Darwin Nunez and said the Liverpool forward took his chance against Bournemouth. Nunez made his first start of the season as Liverpool won 3-0 against Bournemouth in the Premier League on Saturday. The Uruguay international has been limited to cameo appearances off the bench during the opening weeks of the campaign […] The post Robertson says Liverpool teammate ‘took chance’ against Bournemouth first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Liverpool 3-0 Bournemouth PLAYER RATINGS: Who 'had a cigar out'? Who 'will have left the pitch fuming'? And which 7/10 star played the pass of the match?
arts.sum: DOMINIC KING AT ANFIELD: The defeat left Andoni Iraola's side on five points from five matches while Arne Slot could spend the evening wallowing in the glory of sitting in pole position.

arts.sum: Liverpool picked up their fourth win in five league matches under Arne Slot thanks to Luis Diaz and Ryan Gravenberch.

arts.ttl: With five goals in five games, Luis Diaz is reaping the rewards of Arne Slot’s quiet evolution

arts.ttl: Darwin Nunez goal celebration speaks volumes after ending miserable Liverpool run
arts.sum: Darwin Nunez scored Liverpool's third goal against Bournemouth on Saturday, following on from two Luis Diaz strikes in the first half of the Premier League clash
